game_name: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers: The Movie

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this game

special_mechanics.name: Morphing System
special_mechanics.description: Players begin each level in civilian persona and fill a 'Morphing meter' by collecting thunderbolt-shaped items dropped by enemies. When filled, players transform into Rangers, gaining powered-up kick attacks and signature weapons. Morphing can also be triggered automatically when encountering bosses.

physics_values.morphing_meter_fill_source: enemy drops and morphing sign bolts
physics_values.morphing_effect: increased damage output, access to signature weapon special attacks

special_mechanics.name: Multi-plane Action
special_mechanics.description: Game features multi-plane side-scrolling action, allowing movement across different depth planes during combat sequences.

special_mechanics.name: Two-Player Simultaneous Mode
special_mechanics.description: Game supports simultaneous two-player cooperative gameplay with shared screen.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. No specific movement physics values (speed, acceleration, gravity) documented in available sources. Sources contain game design descriptions, feature documentation, and critical reception but lack technical physics parameter specifications. Game reviewed as mediocre Final Fight clone with decent graphics but limited move variety.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Mighty Morphin Power Rangers: The Movie (SNES)
Wikipedia - Mighty Morphin Power Rangers: The Movie (video game)
